positive: Cyberpunk portrait illustration of a character standing in a rainy, neon-drenched alleyway. The character has glowing tech implants and wears distressed futuristic clothing. High contrast, deep shadows, strong magenta and teal glow. Cinematic, gritty, detailed ink work, Blade Runner atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, pastel colors, soft lighting, cartoonish, clean environment
